title: 训练前沿开放权重模型有盈利模式吗？
full_text:
Ethan Mollick on X: "Is there a business model for being profitable off training frontier open weights models?
Other people can host, fine-tune, consult etc. as least as cheaply as you can. There are no ancilary product sales & it is fantastically expensive to make compared to most open source work" / X
